description_long: This is a small, hand-crafted doll featuring a pink woven dress and a long, textured green veil with gold trim draped over its head and shoulders. The doll's face is detailed with stitched features, including a small nose and closed eyes, giving it a serene expression. Its arms are positioned in front, with one hand appearing to hold or cradle a small, dark object, possibly representing a baby or another item. The green veil is the most prominent feature, covering the head and extending down the back, with a visible seam and gold decorative edge. The body is cylindrical and the surface texture is clearly knitted or crocheted, suggesting a soft, fabric construction. The overall appearance is that of a traditional or folk-style figure, possibly inspired by nativity or cultural motifs.
description: A hand-crafted doll in a pink dress with a long green and gold-trimmed veil, featuring stitched facial details and a serene expression. The doll's arms are positioned in front, holding a small dark object.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green veil draped over the head and shoulders, with the pink dress and one arm visible holding a dark object.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing more of the doll's face, stitched features, and both arms, with the green veil framing the head.
description_view_2: Rear side view dominated by the green veil, with only a hint of the pink dress and minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_3: Back view showing the full length of the green veil with gold trim, covering most of the doll's body and head.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional folk-style attire with a long green knitted veil trimmed in gold, and a simple pink woven dress. The garments are plain with no visible patterns, evoking a handmade, cultural or nativity-inspired theme.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head slightly bowed. Both arms are bent at the elbows and positioned in front of the torso, with one hand holding a small dark object. The legs are not individually defined, and the torso is cylindrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is serene and neutral, with closed eyes and a small, subtle mouth. The features are stitched, giving a calm and peaceful appearance.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is fully covered by the green veil.
